data.title: Republican Candidates Secure Victory in Florida Congressional Election
data.description: According to PANews, two Republican candidates, Randy Fine and Jimmy Patronis, have won the Florida congressional by-election, strengthening the Republican Party's narrow majority in the House of Representatives. Both candidates have expressed public support for digital assets and innovation policies. The Super Political Action Committee Fairshake, which backs the U.S. crypto industry, invested over $1.5 million in advertising to support their campaigns.

data.title: FDUSD Exchange Rate Shows Signs of Recovery
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent market data indicates that the FDUSD exchange rate has experienced a slight recovery. The rate briefly surpassed 0.96 USDT and is currently quoted at 0.9508 USDT. This development suggests a stabilization in the currency's value.

data.title: BNB fell below 600 USDT, down 2.79% in 24 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News shows that BNB fell below 600 USDT and is currently trading at 599.3 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 2.79%.

data.title: LEVER fell below 0.00053 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 32.35%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The market shows that LEVER fell below 0.00053 USDT and is now at 0.000529 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 32.35%

data.title: FDUSD fell below 0.95 USDT and is now at 0.9426 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that the FDUSD de-anchoring situation has intensified, falling below 0.95 USDT, and the current price is 0.9426 USDT.

data.title: FDUSD fell below 0.9 USDT and is now at 0.897 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market conditions show that FDUSD’s decoupling has intensified and has fallen below 0.9 USDT, currently trading at 0.897 USDT.

data.title: FDUSD Stablecoin Experiences Price Fluctuation Following Bankruptcy Claims
data.description: According to Foresight News, the stablecoin FDUSD issued by First Digital Trust experienced a significant price drop after claims of bankruptcy by Sun Yuchen. The coin's value fell to $0.972 at one point and is currently trading at approximately $0.9756. The situation has raised concerns about the stability of FDUSD in the market.

data.title: FDUSD is de-anchored and is now trading at 0.972 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Perhaps influenced by Sun Yuchen’s post on the X platform that FDT is actually insolvent and unable to fulfill its obligations to redeem customer funds, the market shows that FDUSD has decoupled and is now trading at 0.972 USDT.

data.title: Fidelity launches retirement plan project to support direct investment in BTC, ETH and LTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Fidelity announced the launch of a new retirement plan project, providing investors with another way to invest in crypto assets. By opening a fee-free crypto IRA retirement account, any U.S. citizen over the age of 18 can directly invest in BTC, ETH and LTC. These assets are kept by Fidelity and stored in cold wallets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,900 USDT with a Narrowed 0.69% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 02, 2025, 15:32 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,900 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,900.140015 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.69% decrease in 24 hours.
